features.claim: Antigravity supports the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to securely connect the editor to local tools, databases, and external services.
features.name: MCP Integration
subfeatures: Context Resources: The AI can read data from connected MCP servers — such as live database schemas or build logs — to inform its code suggestions
Custom Tools: MCP enables Antigravity to execute specific, safe actions defined by connected servers, such as creating issues or searches
MCP Store: A built-in MCP Store lets users browse, install, and manage supported MCP server integrations directly within the editor
Connecting Custom MCP Servers: Users can connect arbitrary custom MCP servers by editing a raw JSON configuration file, supporting both stdio and remote transports
Authentication: Antigravity supports multiple authentication methods for MCP servers including Google Application Default Credentials and OAuth
